tasks.check: deno check --unstable-raw-imports src/main.dev.ts && deno check --unstable-raw-imports src/main.preview.ts && deno check --unstable-raw-imports src/main.mainnet.ts
tasks.dev: deno task -f @paimaexample/tui clean && EFFECTSTREAM_ENV=dev NODE_ENV=development deno run -A --check --unstable-raw-imports scripts/start.dev.ts
tasks.preview: deno task -f @paimaexample/tui clean && EFFECTSTREAM_ENV=preview NODE_ENV=development deno run -A --check --unstable-raw-imports scripts/start.preview.ts
tasks.mainnet: deno task -f @paimaexample/tui clean && EFFECTSTREAM_ENV=mainnet NODE_ENV=production deno run -A --check --unstable-raw-imports scripts/start.mainnet.ts
